pages.title: Soul Lantern
pages.text: $(5)Few relics are more profane than this.$() The Soul Lantern does not draw power from the dead. It steals it from the living.$(br2)Only an oathbound bearer may awaken it.

pages.title: Forging the Lantern
pages.text: Its shell is fashioned from grief, ash, and starlight. Even unlit, it feels hungry.

pages.title: Harvesting a Soul Gem
pages.text: With the lantern in hand, $(l)right-click$() to harvest a fragment of your own soul.$(br2)Each use removes $(c)1 HP$() from your permanent max vitality and creates $(6)1 Soul Gem$().$(br2)The lantern will refuse to harvest if too little of you remains.

pages.title: Purpose
pages.text: Soul Gems are used to advance certain $(d)Titan's Remnants$(). Their power is not bought with loot alone, but with the slow unmaking of the bearer.
